note: CoinLoan had used daily withdrawal limits of 5000 dollars before its later halt.
A notice of restraint required interim-liquidator approval for asset management.
CoinLoan halted user withdrawals and services after the court-related notice.
The Estonian public notice documented the restraint on disposition.
Bit4You suspended operations after CoinLoan was declared insolvent by an Estonian court.
CoinLoan recovery moved into a creditor claims process with submission deadlines.
